general-ignore

@Slack Admin Bot created this channel on September 29th, 2021. This is the very beginning of the general-ignore channel.
wave emoji Hello! Welcome to Salesforce salesforce emoji . You might be new here, and if so, this is the first channel you’ll see. Sadly, we don’t use this channel. Also, you can’t leave it. The explanation for this is long and not very interesting. But! We’re glad you’re here. Please enjoy the limitless bounty of conversation and knowledge that you’ll find in literally every other channel but this one.  Head on over to the [ all-salesforce channel  (link)]for company announcements!|.21,105 reactions, 1 link.
Andy White:  11:53 PM11:53 PM.
Hello! Welcome to Salesforce . You might be new here, and if so, this is the first channel you’ll see.Sadly, we don’t use this channel. Also, you can’t leave it. The explanation for this is long and not very interesting. But! We’re glad you’re here. Please enjoy the limitless bounty of conversation and knowledge that you’ll find in literally every other channel but this one.  Head on over to the all-salesforce channel for company announcements!|
